core_principles: Clarity is King: In logistics, ambiguity is fatal. Every pixel must serve a purpose.
Hub & Spoke Metaphor: Visuals should radiate from a central point (The Hub) to the edges (Spokes).
Time is Physical: Visualize time as tangible blocks. Drive time has 'weight' (gray, textured). Class time has 'energy' (vibrant).
Iowa Grounded: Use an earthy but modern palette—Deep Soil, Corn Gold, Sky Blue—translated into a clean SaaS aesthetic.
anti_patterns: No gradient overload. Use flat, high-contrast surfaces for readability.
No hidden interactions. Logistics managers need to see the state at a glance.
Avoid 'floaty' elements. Everything must feel anchored to the grid or the map.

primary.name: Hub Indigo
primary.usage: Primary Actions, The Hub Location, Active States

neutral.name: Drive Time Gray
neutral.usage: Drive Time Blocks, Inactive States, Backgrounds

semantic_assignments.class_block: bg-indigo-600 text-white border-l-4 border-indigo-800 shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700
semantic_assignments.drive_block: bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 border border-gray-200 border-dashed pattern-diagonal-lines-sm hover:bg-gray-200

layout.structure: Split Layout: Fixed Sidebar (Left) + Scrollable Main Content (Right)
layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for Dashboard Overview (3-4 cols)

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-red-50 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-100 border border-red-200 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.default: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.metric: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 p-6 flex flex-col justify-between

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-gray-200 focus:border-indigo-500 focus:ring-indigo-500 shadow-sm bg-gray-50/50

calendar.wrapper: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-gray-200 overflow-hidden
calendar.header: flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50

map_view.container: rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-gray-200 shadow-inner h-[500px] w-full relative
map_view.controls: absolute top-4 right-4 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md p-2 flex flex-col gap-2

specific_instructions.calendar_logic: Implement a custom Weekly view where 'Drive Time' blocks are automatically inserted before and after 'Class Time' blocks based on distance from Hub (2210 Grand Ave). Visualize these blocks with a distinct gray/striped pattern.
specific_instructions.map_integration: Use @vis.gl/react-google-maps or a similar library. If API key is missing, fallback to a static map image with CSS markers overlaid.
specific_instructions.pdf_export: Use jspdf and html2canvas to capture the Calendar view as a report.
specific_instructions.auth: Simple JWT implementation. Store token in localStorage.
specific_instructions.responsive: On mobile, switch Calendar to 'Daily' view or 'List' view. Hide the Sidebar behind a hamburger menu.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for the main background. Keep it clean.
Do NOT center text in the main dashboard area. Left-align for readability.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Use Lucide icons for all UI iconography.
Follow the file structure: /app/frontend/src/components/ui/ for Shadcn components.
